text: I find myself immersed in a liminal, almost surreal environment. The blue and violet glow of the first room feels both futuristic and slightly cold, making me aware of my own separateness as an observer. As I move closer to the exhibit marked 'R+D,' I see words on the wall which reflect back my own state of mind: confusion, flickering purpose, blurred reality. I feel like a participant in an experiment, one where meaning is not fully formed until long after the moment has passed. There is a certain comfort in this uncertainty—a sense that being lost is just another way of exploring.
